title: The Villagers Close In
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on the villagers close in, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Villagers Close In. Wapol loses control of the castle and the people’s fear as Luffy, Chopper, and the others push the tyrant back. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: You can't run from me!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Nooooa!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Agh!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Mahahaha! I'll start by killing you!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: NUGA HHH!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: found ya!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Huh? Was he always that skinny?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ahh!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Luffy... Mind explaining to me why my jacket is now sleeveless...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Tap tap

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea how much that jacket costs!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I had to pay 28,800 BERS!! And that was its discounted price!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sorry, sorry! That guy just fired a cannon at me so...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Oh, fine...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What- ever.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'll forgive you... After all, when I agreed to lend you that jacket,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I didn't think I'd actually get it back in its original condition.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Of course, you'll still have to pay me back by paying 3 times the price.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: But since the numbers might be a bit hard to remember, why don't we call it an even 100 grand, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Whaaa! y-you planned this all along, didn't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Mahahaha! That's enough, you hippos!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: ugh,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He sure can take a hit...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This here is the Royal Armour and I alone possess the key to it!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Inside are lethal and fearsome weapons of all types!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And I'll devour each and every one of them,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And use my baku baku shook,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to trans- form my entire self into a living human weapon!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Now behold!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: As I unlock the door to your doors with this k...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's gone!

summary: This part highlights the villagers close in and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
